programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: The constant beeping of a painter's lift drives a Colorado neighbor to threaten to sever the hydraulic cables with a bolt cutter; in Georgia, a neighbor calls the police on a Black babysitter; a brawl breaks out on a California beach.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Stoop cleaning escalates into a bloody hallway brawl; a stray dog sparks a heated confrontation; a pumpkin-eating pig becomes a neighborhood sensation.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In a scene straight out of a horror movie, an Oregon man is creeped out to discover a neighbor's hand repeatedly reaching under his fence; a student in New Hampshire learns a valuable life lesson when he gets into a scuffle with a neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Pizza workers serve up punches and headlocks when a neighbor starts a late-night brawl; a man tries to blow up his Baltimore County neighborhood; a woman takes a shovel to her neighbor's car because it's parked in her husband's usual spot.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In a gated community in California, the arrival of a new car sparks a furious fight between the delivery driver and a neighbor; a Florida glassblower's dreams are shattered when a landlord threatens to evict her from his property.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A 25-year-old feud over a shed comes to a head when one neighbor decides to demolish it with his truck; a hoard of fireworks suddenly explodes at a neighborhood block party; a Denver man tries to retrieve his neighbor's stolen mountain bike.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A confrontation about an unleashed dog in a park escalates into violence; a neighbor's constant daily outbursts disturb the peace in a quiet neighborhood; a school bus driver crashes through the front of a neighbor's house.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An animal lover helping a family of lost ducks to the local pond is confronted by an angry neighbor; a family gets into a screaming match with a lawn care worker in New Jersey; an Independence Day fireworks celebration goes horribly awry.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, a neighbor and a teenager go head-to-head over a near miss with a hoverboard; a dispute over a political candidate's campaign sign pits New Jersey neighbors against each other.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A California woman treats neighbors to breakfast and a show after an apparent discrepancy in paying her restaurant bill; dueling dads come to blows at the neighborhood pool in Texas; a gardener traps her hand in a hedge trimmer.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Austin fisherman finds himself caught up in a squabble with neighbors at the marina over where he can drop his lines; a street fight breaks out on a Florida couple's front lawn, prompting commentary by the man recording that he later regrets.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A pest control salesman is chased away by an irate neighbor who considers him a nuisance; a woman grows irritated by her neighbor's new backyard construction project; the smoke from a homeowner's fire pit has the neighbor fuming.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: When a Houston family is denied access to a Fourth of July party at the neighborhood pool, verbal fireworks are set off; in New York, a man pulls out a switchblade during a school PTA meeting; in Pennsylvania, a woman taunts her neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A store manager makes a stink when he catches two local girls attempting to shoplift air freshener; a couple in Tulsa, Oklahoma, endure countless disruptions from the family next door.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two brothers confront a neighbor who they claim is spraying muddy water on their cars; a woman talks trash on her live feed as she has a neighbor's car towed out of her parking spot; clips of unidentified flying objects above neighborhoods.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A man in San Francisco throws eggs and accusations at neighbors in a bizarre confrontation caught on camera; in Brooklyn, a woman is stunned when her neighbor hurls cruel insults about her fertility in a disturbing sidewalk tirade.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Jupiter, Florida, an animal activist confronts a family she thinks is swimming near manatees, accusing them of putting wildlife at risk; in England, a man's chats with a mutual neighbor spark drama with the woman next door; and in Ontario, a woman faces off with her neighbor who thinks she owns the entirety of their shared driveway and refuses to back down.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Minnesota woman and her newborn baby are terrified by a man who enters their home with a loaded shotgun; in Florida, a man walking his dog is confronted by an angry neighbor who doesn't want the pup's poop on his lawn; and two escaped goats wreak havoc in an Arizona neighborhood.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash heads to Philadelphia to help Paul, who returns from a stint in Vegas to start a family with his fiancée, only to find a stranger has taken over his Pennsylvania home; when Flash confronts multiple occupants, tensions mount, culminating in a boiling standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ray is ready to move back home-until he discovers an intruder linked to his previous tenant has taken over his house; when Flash and his team step inside, it's anything but a routine squatter removal job; the house is uninhabitable, and the danger runs far deeper than expected.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.
